prompt:
A long narrow notebook strip showing hand-drawn moon phases progressing through an eclipse, with subtle shading changes and timing ticks implied by layout. A clipboard and red observing light nearby make it clearly a timed phase-sequence record.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low light, realistic paper and pencil texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the strip centered and uncluttered.
